# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

parameters:
  appServiceName: {}
  sqlDatabaseName: {}
  storageAccountName: {}
  resourceGroupName: {}

resources:
  - name: AppServicePlan
    type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
    apiVersion: 2018-02-01
    location: West US
    sku: S1

  - name: WebApp
    type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: 2018-02-01
    location: West US
    properties:
      serverFarm: {
        referenceName: AppServicePlan
        type: Linked
      }
      siteConfig:
        javaVersion: DEFAULT

  - name: SqlDatabase
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: 2020-02-01-preview
    location: West US
    properties:
      sku:
        name: S0
        tier: Standard

  - name: StorageAccount
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    location: West US
    kind: StorageV2

  - name: SqlServer
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: 2020-02-01-preview
    location: West US
    properties:
      administratorLogin: {}
      administratorLoginPassword: {}

outputs:
  resourceGroup: {
    value: ${resourceGroupName}
    type: string
  }
